name: Guessable CAPTCHA
description: The product uses a CAPTCHA challenge that can be guessed or automatically recognized by a non-human actor. Common causes include insufficiently distorted images, mathematically solvable questions, limited answer sets, trivia with accessible answers, or metadata hints about CAPTCHA contents.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node presents a CAPTCHA challenge where the AUTH node accepts responses without a CONTROL node ensuring sufficient entropy, distortion, or resistance to automated solving. Look for CAPTCHA implementations with predictable answer spaces.
